about.sub: Pixelholic (registered as 玖漾國際行銷有限公司) is a brand consultancy focused on integrated digital marketing, helping brands stand out in the digital age with precise strategy and bold creativity.
about.intro1: We believe brand growth works like a video game — you clear it one level at a time. From KingCart EV accessories and Polaris eSIM to Woolbuddy selling worldwide, we've helped brands across tech, food, and handmade crafts level up, stage by stage.
about.intro2: We're more than just an ad agency — we're your long-term growth partner. On every project, we show up like founders, treating your brand as if it were our own.

kingcart.name: KingCart
kingcart.tagline: The go-to accessory partner for Tesla owners
kingcart.description: KingCart is Taiwan's leading Tesla accessories brand, specializing in premium accessories for the Model 3, Y, S, and X — from center console organizers to carbon fiber badges and cabin upgrades. The brand operates three showrooms across Taiwan: Taipei Neihu, Taichung Nantun, and Tainan.
kingcart.challenge: Tesla registrations in Taiwan keep hitting record highs, yet the accessory market is flooded with cheap no-name products: owners can't tell quality apart, so price decides everything. KingCart had the product strength — what it lacked was a brand owners would recognize and pay a premium for.
kingcart.solution: We repositioned KingCart from "selling accessories" to "the premium lifestyle brand for Tesla owners": high-craft unboxing videos and owner lifestyle content built the taste association, precisely targeted Meta Ads reached current and soon-to-be Tesla owners, and owner-community KOLs spread the word. In parallel, an SEO content strategy grew the brand's blog until keywords like "Tesla accessories recommendation" held page one of Google — a steady stream of free organic traffic and orders that grew the official site from ~10% to about half of total revenue.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped us shift from “selling accessories” to “selling a lifestyle.” Our brand premium grew significantly, and average order value increased by 40%.
testimonial.author: KingCart Founder

polaris.name: Polaris eSIM
polaris.description: Polaris eSIM is a Taiwan-native travel eSIM brand and the first to introduce full "route transparency" — letting travelers see exactly which carrier route each plan uses before they buy. Coverage spans 200+ countries and regions, with native direct routes in 10+ popular destinations. Polaris has been featured in Commercial Times, Economic Daily News, and TechNews.
polaris.challenge: An eSIM is the classic "invisible product": buyers can't judge quality before purchase, and if they end up on a detoured route, they just eat the loss. Everyone in the market competes on price and nobody talks about quality — Polaris needed a claim that was both memorable and verifiable.
polaris.solution: We translated a technical edge into consumer language with the "route transparency" brand promise: see the exit route before you pay. Social media led the charge, building brand voice and conversation with travel-scenario content; in-depth tech media PR added authority (coverage in Commercial Times, Economic Daily News, and TechNews), while Google Ads captured mindshare ahead of peak travel season — driving major growth in brand search and organic traffic.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic turned our technical edge into language consumers actually understand — making “route transparency” an industry talking point that drove significant organic traffic.
testimonial.author: Polaris eSIM Marketing Director

cmei.name: CMEI Select
cmei.tagline: Taiwan-select ingredients, fresh to your door
cmei.description: CMEI Select is built around carefully sourced Taiwanese ingredients, best known for its thick-cut juicy pork jerky strips (honey, garlic, Sichuan spicy, Thai lime, and more — 9 flavors), alongside imported snacks, juices, and lifestyle goods from Japan, Korea, New Zealand and Australia. Products are sold on major channels including PX Mart, PChome, momo, Shopee, and Eastern Home Shopping.
cmei.challenge: Food e-commerce is the reddest of red oceans: a new brand has no shelf advantage and no voice — why would a shopper pick you out of a wall of jerky? CMEI needed to build "we dare to show what's inside" trust, fast.
cmei.solution: Centered on "genuine Taiwan-select ingredients," we made quality visible with ingredient-sourcing videos and taste-test unboxings, while SEO built out brand and product keywords so organic search and platform traffic compounded each other; cross-platform joint promotions and limited-flavor flash drops created scarcity buzz — rolling each wave of traffic into cross-platform sales and reaching momo's jerky-category Top 5 within the first year.

testimonial.quote: From unknown to Top 5 in momo's jerky category — Pixelholic's e-commerce strategy helped us achieve in one year what usually takes three.
testimonial.author: CMEI Select CEO

yunyang.name: Yunyang International Travel
yunyang.tagline: 30 years of expertise, flying you to your dream destination
yunyang.description: Founded in 1992, Yunyang International Travel has served the Tainan and Chiayi travel market for over 30 years as a licensed Category-A travel agency. Since 2005 it has been the exclusive Vietnam Airlines agent for the greater Tainan region, winning the region's top sales award year after year — including the Vietnam Airlines Platinum Sales Award in 2024. It also operates a Taiwan Compatriot Permit and passport processing center serving over 100 partner agencies across the Yunlin-Chiayi-Tainan region.
yunyang.challenge: The classic problem of a 30-year institution: all the reputation lives offline, while online the brand is nearly invisible. Its customer base skewed older, and younger travelers searching "Vietnam travel" never saw Yunyang at all — for a legacy brand, digital transformation isn't extra credit, it's survival.
yunyang.solution: We brought 30 years of reputation online with social media as the main battlefield: a Vietnam travel content matrix on Instagram and Facebook reached travelers aged 25–45 and made social the brand's new storefront, driving major traffic growth. In parallel we repositioned the brand around "30 years of trust, the top choice for Vietnam travel," optimized the website and Google Ads, and managed Google reviews — turning old word-of-mouth into proof new customers can see at a glance.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped us make a smooth digital transition, bringing 30 years of word-of-mouth reputation online. Vietnam tour bookings grew significantly, and even younger customers started finding us.
testimonial.author: Yunyang International Travel General Manager

woolbuddy.name: Woolbuddy
woolbuddy.tagline: Bring Creativity to Life with Wool
woolbuddy.description: Woolbuddy is a needle-felting brand founded by Jackie Huang, a former 3D artist at Lucasfilm, offering premium felting kits, wool roving, and felting mats. Designed around a zero-waste, eco-friendly philosophy, the brand is beloved by crafters worldwide, repeatedly ranked as a bestseller in Amazon's handicrafts category, and sold across multiple global markets.
woolbuddy.challenge: Woolbuddy is an Amazon bestseller in the West, yet almost unknown in Taiwan; the crafting audience is scattered across niche groups where paid ads can't reach — influence there has to be grown through content.
woolbuddy.solution: We put the brand's strongest asset — the founder's story as a former Lucasfilm artist — at the heart of the narrative, produced a series of Mandarin needle-felting tutorials, and rode IG Reels and YouTube Shorts into the crafting community, while optimizing Amazon product pages so that attention actually converted into orders and long-tail sales.

testimonial.quote: Pixelholic helped our brand story resonate in Taiwan — the crafting community's engagement exceeded expectations and drove steady long-tail sales.
testimonial.author: Woolbuddy Founder, Jackie

letape.name: L'Étape Sun Moon Lake
letape.tagline: Bringing Tour de France glory to Sun Moon Lake
letape.description: L'Étape Sun Moon Lake, presented by Nutrilite, is an A.S.O.-certified international cycling event under the official Tour de France series. Its debut edition in 2024 drew 2,600 riders from 25+ countries, making it one of Asia's most important cycling events. The route runs through Sun Moon Lake's Xiangshan Visitor Center and links up with the Sun Moon Lake bikeway, named one of the world's most beautiful cycling routes by CNN, with the champion earning a spot at the following year's L'Étape World Championship.

metrics.label: Global Recognition
metrics.sub: Route links the CNN top-10 most beautiful bikeway

letape.challenge: The Tour de France's official series was landing in Taiwan for the first time, with no existing digital assets locally. The website would be the first gateway for riders worldwide to discover the event and register — it had to earn the professional trust of a world-class event in months, with registration conversion as its only scoreboard.
letape.solution: Pixelholic built the official event website: adapting the Tour de France visual guidelines for a localized presence, laying out event highlights, routes, and registration steps in one clear information architecture, and optimizing the registration flow for conversion — so international riders could trust fast and sign up smoothly. We also supported social channels with on-course footage and rider stories. The debut edition drew 2,600 riders from 25+ countries.
